method: offline source + committed Editor captures + Unity EditMode/PlayMode via the normal CLI workflow; no Unity MCP

issues.behavior: status colours are profile-independent; the token schema has one color per status
issues.impact: on the glasses profile the audit verdict is rendered in effectively invisible colours
issues.correction: profile-aware status colour resolution backed by per-profile token variants
issues.scope: token schema + generator + glyph resolver + parity tests
issues.offlineAcceptance: 266 contrast combinations, 0 failures, lowest ratio 4.65; EditMode 146/146; PlayMode failure identity set unchanged

issues.behavior: left->center gap 2.40u (458px) vs 438px content; center->right gap 3.15u (601px) vs 693px content
issues.impact: three claims overprint each other in the first-failure state
issues.correction: widen column gaps or reduce per-column truncation budgets to measured worst case
issues.offlineAcceptance: 7/7 projected-bounds geometry tests over 90 combinations (5 profiles x 2 languages x 9 states); EditMode 146/146; PlayMode failure identity set unchanged

issues.behavior: body row step 0.12u=22.9px and trust label/value step 0.10u=19.1px vs ~30px rendered line box
issues.impact: all four Trust Strip label/value pairs collide; role row is overprinted
issues.correction: derive row step from the rendered line height per type size
issues.offlineAcceptance: 7/7 projected-bounds geometry tests over 90 combinations (5 profiles x 2 languages x 9 states); EditMode 146/146; PlayMode failure identity set unchanged

issues.behavior: banner at top+x2.90 with UpperLeft anchor and no truncation runs past the frame edge
issues.impact: the degraded-mode explanation is cut mid-sentence
issues.offlineAcceptance: 6/6 banner geometry tests over 40 combinations (5 profiles x 2 languages x 4 banner states) plus 4 silent states; EditMode 146/146; PlayMode failure identity set unchanged

issues.behavior: hardcoded Hex("#961418") ignores the active profile
issues.impact: the honesty guarantee separating Editor evidence from device evidence is the least readable element in the dark profiles
issues.correction: resolve the disclaimer colour through the active profile
issues.offlineAcceptance: 266 contrast combinations, 0 failures, lowest ratio 4.65; EditMode 146/146; PlayMode failure identity set unchanged

issues.scene: Presenter / Spatial Agent Panel (not the audited surfaces)
issues.behavior: full PlayMode at e14e264 = 70 total / 60 passed / 8 failed / 2 skipped; failures persist when the class runs in isolation
issues.impact: presenter state does not clear between profiles; prior green claims covered only the subsets that were run

issues.behavior: first-failure marker is T_LABEL 0.030, smaller than both T_TITLE 0.052 elements; 'FIRST FAILURE' appears 4x at 4 sizes in 3 regions
issues.impact: the eye lands on the story title, not on the failure
issues.offlineAcceptance: 6/6 hierarchy tests over 110 combinations (5 profiles x 2 languages x 11 states); EditMode 146/146; PlayMode failure identity set unchanged

issues.behavior: 1.52u of 5.24u visible height (29%) is empty between centre content and the rail while three columns crowd the top 40%
issues.impact: the crowding is self-inflicted; unused space exists
issues.note: unused capacity partially borrowed by the UX-02 fix (left margin, lower band); the issue itself remains OPEN

issues.behavior: profile changes theme text and background only; every status colour is identical to DesktopDark
issues.impact: the high-contrast profile adds almost no contrast where the semantics live
issues.offlineAcceptance: 266 contrast combinations, 0 failures, lowest ratio 4.65; EditMode 146/146; PlayMode failure identity set unchanged

issues.behavior: the key is localized but focus.Role is passed through raw, so the Chinese view shows '角色: decision'
issues.impact: English leaks into the Chinese view on a semantic field

issues.behavior: 'not present', 'not evaluated' and 'affected downstream' all render in #8a92a0, while SOURCE NOT PRESENT renders bright white
issues.impact: absent evidence is not distinguishable from unknown evidence

issues.component: Workspace vs Audit Room Flat colour grammar
issues.behavior: Flat treats intact as a neutral #E8E8E8 surface with verification carried by deviation (pinned by test/threejs-profile-override.test.js); the Workspace paints VERIFIED #4ade80 as a resting state
issues.impact: two incompatible colour grammars for the same concept across the two surfaces

issues.behavior: no EventSystem, raycaster, Selectable or hit target; focus is a region rebuild with no persistent visual state
issues.impact: no controller affordance exists; equally, no accidental-activation risk

issues.behavior: rail label at y+0.16 collides with the #n index at y-0.16; the action row at y-0.36 runs under it
issues.impact: minor legibility loss on the rail
issues.offlineAcceptance: 6/6 guide geometry tests over 90 combinations (5 profiles x 2 languages x 9 states, step counts 1/2/3/4/6); EditMode 146/146; PlayMode failure identity set unchanged

issues.behavior: destroys every ShadowStageController and ShadowLensRuntimeBootstrap root and leaves a second MainCamera-tagged CaptureCam; with SHADOW_CAPTURE=1 the suite fails 10 instead of 8
issues.impact: capture runs cannot be trusted as regression runs

implementationNote: UX-01/05/09 (d664873), UX-02/03 (d7feb01), UX-04 (01864b4), UX-07 (3c5e9ba) and UX-14 implemented offline. UX-06, UX-08, UX-10, UX-11, UX-12, UX-13, UX-15 remain open.
